# Website-CGS
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --gold: #C9A84C;
    --gold-light: #F0D98B;
    --gold-dark: #A07830;
    --deep: #0D1117;
    --deep2: #161B22;
    --mid: #21262D;
    --surface: #1C2128;
    --text: #E6EDF3;
    --text-muted: #8B949E;
    --text-dim: #484F58;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --accent: #E05A1F;
    --accent2: #3B82F6;
    --radius: 16px;
    --radius-sm: 10px;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--deep);
    color: var(--text);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* SCROLLBAR */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--deep); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--gold-dark); border-radius: 3px; }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    padding: 18px 5%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    background: rgba(13,17,23,0.85);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  }
  .nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-logo img { width: 42px; height: 42px; object-fit: contain; }
  .nav-logo-text { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.2; }
  .nav-logo-text span { display: block; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 400; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 36px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.03em; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--deep); padding: 10px 22px;
    border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem;
    text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; padding: 4px; }
  .hamburger span { width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--text); border-radius: 2px; transition: all 0.3s; }

  /* HERO */
  #hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 80px 5% 22%;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background: 
      radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 60% 40%, rgba(201,168,76,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 50% at 20% 80%, rgba(59,130,246,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(13,17,23,0.2) 0%, rgba(13,17,23,0.85) 70%, var(--deep) 100%);
  }
  .hero-cross {
    position: absolute; top: 12%; right: 8%;
    opacity: 0.07; font-size: 28vw;
    font-family: serif; color: var(--gold);
    line-height: 1; pointer-events: none;
    animation: float 8s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes float { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-18px)} }
  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 50px;
    margin-bottom: 28px; width: fit-content; position: relative; z-index: 1;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both;
  }
  .hero-tag::before {
    content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gold); animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)} 50%{opacity:0.5;transform:scale(1.4)} }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 4rem);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05;
    color: var(--white);
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.1s ease both;
  }
  .hero-title em {
    font-style: normal; color: var(--gold);
    display: block;
  }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 560px;
    line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 22px;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.2s ease both;
  }
  .hero-actions {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: 40px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--deep);
    padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.25s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    border: none; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(201,168,76,0.25); }
  .btn-ghost {
    color: var(--text); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.25s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 40px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    z-index: 1; animation: fadeIn 2s 1s both;
  }
  .hero-scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 50px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent);
    animation: scrollLine 2s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes scrollLine { 0%{transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:top} 50%{transform:scaleY(1);transform-origin:top} 50.1%{transform:scaleY(1);transform-origin:bottom} 100%{transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:bottom} }
  @keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
  @keyframes fadeIn { from{opacity:0} to{opacity:1} }

  /* SERVICES */
  .services-strip {
    display: flex; overflow-x: auto; gap: 0;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);
    scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .services-strip::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .service-item {
    flex: 1; min-width: 200px;
    padding: 28px 24px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
    background: var(--deep2);
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .service-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .service-item:hover { background: var(--mid); }
  .service-day { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; }
  .service-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); }
  .service-time { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding: 100px 5%; }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
    font-weight: 900; color: var(--white); line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .section-desc {
    color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 600px;
  }

  /* ABOUT */
  #sobre {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .about-visual {
    position: relative;
  }
  .about-card-main {
    background: var(--deep2); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
    border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .about-card-main img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }
  .about-stat-card {
    position: absolute; bottom: -24px; right: -24px;
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--deep);
    padding: 24px 28px; border-radius: var(--radius);
  }
  .about-stat-number { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.8rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }
  .about-stat-label { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; opacity: 0.75; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
  .about-content { padding-left: 20px; }
  .values-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-top: 40px;
  }
  .value-item {
    background: var(--deep2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 20px;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--gold);
  }
  .value-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .value-title { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .value-desc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5; }

  /* EVENTS */
  #programacao { background: var(--deep2); }
  .events-header {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;
    margin-bottom: 56px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px;
  }
  .events-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
  }
  .event-card {
    background: var(--deep); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block;
  }
  .event-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .event-image {
    width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; object-fit: cover;
    opacity: 0.85; transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .event-card:hover .event-image { opacity: 1; }
  .event-body { padding: 24px; }
  .event-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 50px; margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .event-weekly { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.12); color: #60a5fa; }
  .event-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.2; }
  .event-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .event-meta-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.82rem; }
  .event-meta-icon { color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.9rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .event-desc { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.83rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 14px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

  /* GRUPOS */
  #grupos { }
  .grupos-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px; margin-top: 48px;
  }
  .grupo-card {
    background: var(--deep2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--gold);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }
  .grupo-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 16px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
  .grupo-day { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .grupo-area { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .grupo-time { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .grupo-contact {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 7px 14px; width: fit-content;
    color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* MINISTERIOS */
  #ministerios { background: var(--deep2); }
  .ministerios-intro {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: start; margin-bottom: 60px;
  }
  .min-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 20px;
  }
  .min-card {
    background: var(--deep); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px 24px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .min-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .min-icon {
    width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); display: flex;
    align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 18px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  }
  .min-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .min-desc { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.83rem; line-height: 1.5; }
  .min-contact { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 14px; }

  /* MÍDIAS */
  #midias { }
  .midias-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; margin-top: 56px;
  }

  /* YouTube Carousel */
  .yt-carousel-section { margin-top: 48px; }
  .yt-carousel-block { margin-bottom: 36px; }
  .yt-carousel-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .yt-carousel-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white);
  }
  .yt-carousel-link {
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.2s;
  }
  .yt-carousel-link:hover { opacity: 0.75; }
  .yt-carousel-row {
    display: flex; gap: 10px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 8px;
    scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .yt-carousel-row::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .yt-thumb {
    flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer; scroll-snap-align: start;
    position: relative; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .yt-thumb:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.5); }
  .yt-thumb.active { border-color: var(--gold); }
  .yt-thumb img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
  .yt-thumb-play {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }
  .yt-thumb-play-btn {
    width: 28px; height: 28px; background: #ff0000; border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }
  .yt-thumb-play-btn svg { width: 11px; height: 11px; fill: white; margin-left: 2px; }
  .yt-thumb-title {
    font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.35;
    margin-top: 5px; display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .yt-thumb-more {
    flex-shrink: 0; scroll-snap-align: start; border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.2); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.04);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 6px; text-decoration: none; color: var(--gold); transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .yt-thumb-more:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); }
  .yt-thumb-more svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; fill: none; stroke: var(--gold); stroke-width: 2; }
  .yt-thumb-more span { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .yt-player-wrap {
    border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; background: #000;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .yt-player-wrap iframe { width: 100%; border: none; display: block; }
  .yt-player-close {
    background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 0; margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .yt-player-close:hover { color: var(--text); }
  .yt-skeleton {
    flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 25%, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 75%);
    background-size: 200% 100%;
    animation: shimmer 1.4s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes shimmer { 0%{background-position:200% 0} 100%{background-position:-200% 0} }

  .midias-social {
    background: var(--deep2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 36px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;
  }
  .social-link {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    text-decoration: none; color: var(--text);
    background: var(--deep); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 16px 20px;
    transition: all 0.2s; font-weight: 500;
  }
  .social-link:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); transform: translateX(4px); }
  .social-icon {
    width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .social-yt { background: rgba(255,0,0,0.1); color: #ff4444; }
  .social-ig { background: rgba(225,100,200,0.1); color: #e164c8; }
  .social-fb { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); color: #3b82f6; }
  .social-wa { background: rgba(37,211,102,0.1); color: #25d366; }
  .midias-app {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-dark), var(--gold));
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 36px;
    color: var(--deep); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px;
  }
  .app-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.2; }
  .app-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.6; opacity: 0.8; }
  .app-badges { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .app-badge {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15); color: var(--deep);
    padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700;
    text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  }
  .app-badge:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); }

  /* CONTATO */
  #contato { background: var(--deep2); }
  .contato-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: start;
  }
  .contato-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 28px; margin-top: 40px; }
  .contato-item {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 18px;
  }
  .contato-icon {
    width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 14px;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .contato-label { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .contato-value { color: var(--text); font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.5; }
  .contato-form { margin-top: 40px; }
  .form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
  .form-label { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 8px; display: block; }
  .form-input {
    width: 100%; background: var(--deep); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    color: var(--text); border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 14px 18px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    transition: border-color 0.2s; outline: none;
  }
  .form-input:focus { border-color: var(--gold); }
  .form-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-dim); }
  textarea.form-input { resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }
  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }

  /* MAP EMBED */
  .map-embed {
    border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
    margin-top: 40px; height: 240px;
  }
  .map-embed iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; display: block; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: var(--deep); border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);
    padding: 60px 5% 30px;
  }
  .footer-top {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px;
    padding-bottom: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }
  .footer-brand { }
  .footer-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .footer-logo img { width: 48px; height: 48px; object-fit: contain; }
  .footer-desc { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 340px; }
  .footer-col h4 { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .footer-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .footer-links a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-bottom {
    padding-top: 28px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px;
  }
  .footer-copy { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.8rem; }
  .footer-love { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.8rem; }
  .footer-love span { color: var(--gold); }

  /* QUOTE SECTION */
  .quote-section {
    padding: 100px 5%;
    text-align: center;
    background: var(--deep);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .quote-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 50% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }
  .quote-text {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.2vw, 1.6rem);
    font-weight: 400; font-style: italic;
    color: var(--white); line-height: 1.4;
    max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto 18px;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .quote-ref {
    color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }

  /* APP CONTENT SECTION */
  .app-content-section {
    padding: 80px 5% 60px;
    background: var(--deep2);
  }
  .app-content-inner {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .app-content-section .section-label {
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .app-content-section .section-title {
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
  .app-content-block {
    background: var(--deep); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .app-content-block img.block-img {
    width: 100%; height: auto; display: block;
    opacity: 0.88; transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .app-content-block:hover img.block-img { opacity: 1; }
  .app-content-block .block-body {
    padding: 28px 32px;
  }
  .app-content-block .block-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .app-content-block .block-text {
    color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8;
    white-space: pre-line;
  }
  .leadership-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px; margin-top: 32px;
  }
  .leader-card {
    background: var(--deep); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 24px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .leader-card:hover { border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.3); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .leader-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .leader-photo {
    width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid var(--gold); flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .leader-photo img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
  }
  .leader-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white);
  }
  .leader-role {
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-top: 3px;
  }
  .leader-desc {
    color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.83rem; line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .app-link-btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 48px;
    background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    color: var(--gold); padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .app-link-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border-color: var(--gold);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .app-content-block .block-body { padding: 20px; }
    .leadership-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .values-app-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
  }

  /* EVENT MODAL */
  .modal-overlay {
    display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 2000;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px;
  }
  .modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }
  .modal-content {
    background: var(--deep2); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
    border-radius: 24px; max-width: 600px; width: 100%;
    max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; animation: modalIn 0.3s ease;
  }
  @keyframes modalIn { from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.95) translateY(20px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} }
  .modal-image { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; object-fit: cover; }
  .modal-body { padding: 32px; }
  .modal-meta { display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 16px 0 20px; }
  .modal-meta-chip {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    color: var(--gold); padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;
  }
  .modal-desc { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; white-space: pre-line; }
  .modal-actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .modal-close {
    position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px;
    width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: none; cursor: pointer;
    color: white; font-size: 1.2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .modal-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
  .modal-wrapper { position: relative; }

  /* MOBILE MENU */
  .mobile-menu {
    display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;
    background: rgba(13,17,23,0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 36px; padding: 40px;
  }
  .mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .mobile-menu a {
    color: var(--text); text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .mobile-menu a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .mobile-close {
    position: absolute; top: 24px; right: 24px;
    background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 1.8rem; cursor: pointer;
  }

  /* SCROLL REVEAL */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: all 0.7s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 14px 5%; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .nav-cta { display: none; }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
    #sobre { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .about-visual { max-width: 440px; }
    .about-stat-card { right: 0; bottom: -16px; }
    .about-content { padding-left: 0; }
    .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .midias-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .contato-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .footer-top { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .ministerios-intro { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 30px; }
    .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    section { padding: 70px 5%; }
    .hero-title { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 10vw, 5rem); }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .events-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .grupos-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .min-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .services-strip { flex-direction: column; }
    .service-item { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08); min-width: unset; }
    .hero-actions { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="https://i.ibb.co/Xfp20yt5/Ativo-1-Copia-removebg-preview.png" alt="CGS Logo">
    <div class="nav-logo-text">
      Christus Gemeinde
      <span>Stuttgart</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#sobre">Über uns</a></li>
    <li><a href="#programacao">Programm</a></li>
    <li><a href="#grupos">Hauskreise</a></li>
    <li><a href="#ministerios">Ministerien</a></li>
    <li><a href="#midias">Medien</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contato">Kontakt</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#contato" class="nav-cta">Kontakt aufnehmen</a>
  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Menü">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- MOBILE MENU -->
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <button class="mobile-close" id="mobileClose">✕</button>
  <a href="#sobre" onclick="closeMobile()">Über uns</a>
  <a href="#programacao" onclick="closeMobile()">Programm</a>
  <a href="#grupos" onclick="closeMobile()">Hauskreise</a>
  <a href="#ministerios" onclick="closeMobile()">Ministerien</a>
  <a href="#midias" onclick="closeMobile()">Medien</a>
  <a href="#contato" onclick="closeMobile()">Kontakt</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="home" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-cross">✝</div>
  <div class="hero-tag">📍 Filderstadt · Stuttgart</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    Eine lebendige<br>
    <em>Gemeinde</em>
    in Stuttgart
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Eine Gemeinde, die Christus liebt und Menschen dient. Wir sind eine internationale Gemeinde offen für alle, die Gemeinschaft, Glauben und echte Begegnung mit Gott suchen.</p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="#programacao" class="btn-primary">
      <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="10" x2="21" y2="10"/></svg>
      Veranstaltungen
    </a>
    <a href="#sobre" class="btn-ghost">
      Mehr erfahren →
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    Scroll
    <div class="hero-scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES STRIP -->
<div class="services-strip">
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-day">Montag · 19:00</div>
    <div class="service-name">Gebet</div>
    <div class="service-time">Karl-Benz-Str. 3, Filderstadt</div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-day">Donnerstag · 19:30</div>
    <div class="service-name">Jugend FLY</div>
    <div class="service-time">Karl-Benz-Str. 3, Filderstadt</div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-day">Sonntag · 10:30</div>
    <div class="service-name">Gottesdienst</div>
    <div class="service-time">Karl-Benz-Str. 3, Filderstadt</div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-day">Wöchentlich</div>
    <div class="service-name">Hauskreise</div>
    <div class="service-time">Stuttgart &amp; Umgebung</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ÜBER UNS -->
<section id="sobre">
  <div class="about-visual reveal">
    <div class="about-card-main">
      <img src="https://i.ibb.co/FkgNLbW6/Gemini-Generated-Image-ckis88ckis88ckis.png" alt="Gottesdienst CGS">
    </div>
    <div class="about-stat-card">
      <div class="about-stat-number">+20</div>
      <div class="about-stat-label">Jahre Gemeinde</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-content reveal">
    <div class="section-label">Über uns</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Willkommen bei der<br>Christus Gemeinde</h2>

    <p class="section-desc" style="max-width:100%; font-size: 1.15rem; line-height: 1.8;">Die Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart ist eine internationale Freikirche, die in Filderstadt beheimatet ist. Unser Herz schlägt für Gemeinschaft, Anbetung und Gottes Wort — in einer offenen, multikulturellen Atmosphäre.</p>

    <p class="section-desc" style="max-width:100%; font-size: 1.15rem; line-height: 1.8; margin-top: 20px;">Im Mittelpunkt steht für uns die persönliche Beziehung zu Jesus Christus sowie ein liebevolles Miteinander. Wir glauben daran, dass Kirche ein Ort sein soll, an dem jeder willkommen ist, wachsen kann und echte Gemeinschaft erlebt.</p>

    <p class="section-desc" style="max-width:100%; font-size: 1.15rem; line-height: 1.8; margin-top: 20px;">Egal, ob du schon lange im Glauben unterwegs bist oder einfach neugierig bist: Du bist herzlich eingeladen, unsere Community kennenzulernen und ein Teil davon zu werden!</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- APP ÜBER UNS CONTENT -->
<div class="app-content-section">
  <div class="app-content-inner">
    <div class="section-label reveal">Unsere Geschichte &amp; Werte</div>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">Wer wir sind</h2>

    <!-- Mission -->
    <div class="app-content-block reveal">
      <img class="block-img" src="https://i.ibb.co/jZWcW1Qg/Gemini-Generated-Image-t30neat30neat30n.png" alt="Mission" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
      <div class="block-body">
        <div class="block-title">Unsere Mission</div>
        <p class="block-text">Die Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart ist eine lebendige, multikulturelle Gemeinde in der Region Stuttgart. Wir glauben an die transformierende Kraft des Evangeliums und möchten Menschen aller Nationen zusammenbringen, um Gott zu ehren und einander zu dienen.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Vision -->
    <div class="app-content-block reveal">
      <div class="block-body">
        <div class="block-title">Unsere Vision</div>
        <p class="block-text">Als Gemeinde Gottes leben und verkünden wir Jesu Liebe um die Nationen zu erreichen.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Values with image -->
    <div class="app-content-block reveal">
      <img class="block-img" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1ADG_xVKSNTOT2JBnFqsGD68IAIsYcHqC" alt="Unsere Werte" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
      <div class="block-body">
        <div class="block-title">Unsere Werte</div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-top:8px;" class="values-app-grid">
          <div style="padding:20px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);border-radius:10px;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:1rem;">✝ Glaube</div>
            <p style="font-size:0.97rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.65;">Wir gründen unser Leben auf Gottes Wort und vertrauen auf Jesus Christus als Herrn und Retter.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:20px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);border-radius:10px;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:1rem;">🤝 Gemeinschaft</div>
            <p style="font-size:0.97rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.65;">Wir leben echte Beziehungen — füreinander da sein, miteinander wachsen, zusammen feiern.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:20px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);border-radius:10px;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:1rem;">🙌 Dienst</div>
            <p style="font-size:0.97rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.65;">Jeder hat eine Gabe. Wir dienen mit Freude und bringen uns in das Werk Gottes ein.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:20px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);border-radius:10px;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:1rem;">🎶 Anbetung</div>
            <p style="font-size:0.97rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.65;">Wir ehren Gott mit unserem ganzen Leben — in der Anbetung, im Alltag und im Gebet.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- History with image -->
    <div class="app-content-block reveal">
      <img class="block-img" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1ukjANe6ThDu3fBmDlv5JDxiRzpTJ3mET" alt="Geschichte" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
      <div class="block-body">
        <div class="block-title">Geschichte &amp; Glaube</div>
        <p class="block-text">Wir sind eine christliche Gemeinde und glauben an einen Gott, der alle Menschen bedingungslos liebt. In Jesus hat er sich deutlich offenbart: Er zeigte sich als Sohn Gottes, heilte Kranke, befreite Gefangene, erweckte Tote zum Leben und blieb seiner Botschaft treu – sogar bis zum Tod am Kreuz. Aber Gott hat ihn von den Toten auferweckt.

Durch Jesus erkennen wir, wie Gott ist: Er liebt uns, vergibt uns unsere Schuld und gibt jedem jederzeit die Chance auf einen Neuanfang – egal, wie weit entfernt man sich fühlt.

Und wir glauben, dass der Heilige Geist Gottes auch heute noch wirkt, uns verbindet und uns motiviert, Jesus mit Leidenschaft nachzufolgen.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Leadership -->
    <div class="section-label reveal" style="margin-top:56px;">Leitung</div>
    <h3 class="section-title reveal" style="font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2.2rem);margin-bottom:8px;">Unser Leitungsteam</h3>
    <div class="leadership-grid">
      <div class="leader-card reveal">
        <div class="leader-header">
          <div class="leader-photo">
            <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1Hbdz_noY_Rm0IpRS7xG3vX71o57xVsga" alt="Rudi & Indi" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="leader-name">Rudi &amp; Indi</div>
            <div class="leader-role">Senior Pastoren</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p class="leader-desc">Rudi und Indi sind seit Juli 2019 Senior-Pastoren der CGS, Missionare der Marburger Mission und arbeiten auch bei Renew an Projekten zur Gründung und Wiederbelebung von Gemeinden. "Es ist uns eine Ehre, hier in diesem Haus, der Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart, zu dienen."</p>
      </div>
      <div class="leader-card reveal">
        <div class="leader-header">
          <div class="leader-photo">
            <img src="https://i.ibb.co/gLXsMxJN/Gemini-Generated-Image-u2w0q8u2w0q8u2w0.png" alt="Frank Bachowski" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="leader-name">Frank Bachowski</div>
            <div class="leader-role">Gemeinde Leiter</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p class="leader-desc">Die Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart ist eine fröhliche und bunte, multikulturelle Gemeinde in der Region Stuttgart. Wir leben Vielfalt in Einheit und lieben es, Gemeinschaft miteinander zu haben.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="leader-card reveal">
        <div class="leader-header">
          <div class="leader-photo">
            <img src="https://i.ibb.co/fV0xwVbs/enhanced-image-1.png" alt="Cacau" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="leader-name">Cacau</div>
            <div class="leader-role">Gemeinde Leiter</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p class="leader-desc">Die Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart ist für mich wie ein Zuhause, ein sicherer Hafen — ein Ort, an dem ich Gottes Gegenwart spüre und mich wirklich aufgehoben fühle. Hier bin ich nicht nur Mitglied einer Gemeinde, sondern Teil einer Familie, die im Glauben zusammengewachsen ist.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align:center;">
      <a href="https://christusgemeindestuttgart.de" target="_blank" class="app-link-btn reveal">
        <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2a10 10 0 1 0 0 20A10 10 0 0 0 12 2z"/><path d="M2 12h20M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10A15.3 15.3 0 0 1 8 12a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
        Mehr über uns im App entdecken
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- QUOTE -->
<div class="quote-section">
  <div class="quote-bg"></div>
  <p class="quote-text reveal">"Aber ihr werdet die Kraft des Heiligen Geistes empfangen, der auf euch kommen wird, und ihr werdet meine Zeugen sein."</p>
  <div class="quote-ref reveal">Apostelgeschichte 1,8</div>
</div>

<!-- PROGRAMM -->
<section id="programacao">
  <div class="events-header reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Programm</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Veranstaltungen &amp;<br>Gottesdienste</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="section-desc" style="max-width:360px;">Alle regelmäßigen und besonderen Veranstaltungen auf einen Blick.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="events-grid" id="eventsGrid">
    <!-- Rendered via JS -->
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HAUSKREISE -->
<section id="grupos">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-label">Gemeinschaft</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Hauskreise in<br>Stuttgart</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">In unseren Hauskreisen leben wir echte Gemeinschaft — wöchentlich, persönlich, in deiner Nähe.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="grupos-grid">
    <div class="grupo-card reveal">
      <div class="grupo-day">Dienstag</div>
      <div class="grupo-area">Aspach</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">⏰ 19:00 Uhr</div>
      <div class="grupo-contact">👤 Dieter &amp; Rosa</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grupo-card reveal">
      <div class="grupo-day">Freitag</div>
      <div class="grupo-area">Filderstadt</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">⏰ 19:00 Uhr</div>
      <div class="grupo-contact">👤 Eliana</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grupo-card reveal">
      <div class="grupo-day">Freitag</div>
      <div class="grupo-area">Schorndorf</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">⏰ 19:00 Uhr</div>
      <div class="grupo-contact">👤 Bruno &amp; Desirre</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grupo-card reveal">
      <div class="grupo-day">Mittwoch · Online</div>
      <div class="grupo-area">Online</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">⏰ 19:30 Uhr</div>
      <div class="grupo-contact">👤 Pra. Indi</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grupo-card reveal">
      <div class="grupo-day">Freitag</div>
      <div class="grupo-area">Tübingen / Reutlingen</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">⏰ 19:00 Uhr</div>
      <div class="grupo-contact">👤 Dominik &amp; Debora</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grupo-card reveal">
      <div class="grupo-day">Freitag</div>
      <div class="grupo-area">Filderstadt</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">⏰ 19:00 Uhr · Männer</div>
      <div class="grupo-contact">👤 Frank Bachowski</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grupo-card reveal" style="border-top-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border: 2px dashed rgba(201,168,76,0.2); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.03);">
      <div class="grupo-day" style="color:var(--text-muted)">Neuer Hauskreis?</div>
      <div class="grupo-area" style="color: var(--gold);">Mach mit!</div>
      <div class="grupo-time">Sprich uns gerne an</div>
      <a href="#contato" class="grupo-contact" style="text-decoration:none; display:inline-flex;">✉ Kontakt aufnehmen</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MINISTERIEN -->
<section id="ministerios">
  <div class="ministerios-intro">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Diene mit uns</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Ministerien &amp;<br>Teams</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="section-desc reveal" style="margin-top:auto; padding-bottom: 8px;">Jeder hat eine Gabe. Entdecke, wo du dich in der Gemeinde einbringen und mit Gottes Hilfe dienen kannst.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="min-grid">
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🎵</div>
      <div class="min-title">Lobpreisdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Lobpreis und Anbetung im Gottesdienst — mit Stimme, Instrument und Herz.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">💃</div>
      <div class="min-title">Tanzdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Gotteslobpreis durch Tanz und Bewegung — Kreativität im Dienst Gottes.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">👶</div>
      <div class="min-title">Kinderdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Betreuung und altersgerechte Lehre für unsere Kleinsten während des Gottesdienstes.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🙏</div>
      <div class="min-title">Fürbittdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Das Gebetsteam trägt die Anliegen der Gemeinde und der Welt vor Gott.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🤝</div>
      <div class="min-title">Willkommensdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Herzlicher Empfang und Begleitung von Gästen und neuen Geschwistern.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">📡</div>
      <div class="min-title">Technikdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Ton, Streaming und Beamer — technische Unterstützung für jeden Gottesdienst.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🧹</div>
      <div class="min-title">Reinigungsdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Pflege und Reinigung der Gemeinderäume — damit sich alle wohlfühlen.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">💑</div>
      <div class="min-title">Ehepaardienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Begleitung, Stärkung und Gemeinschaft für Ehepaare in der Gemeinde.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">💪</div>
      <div class="min-title">Männerdienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Gemeinschaft, Gottes Wort und gegenseitige Stärkung unter Männern.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🌸</div>
      <div class="min-title">Frauendienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Gemeinschaft, Glaube und gegenseitige Ermutigung unter Frauen.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🔥</div>
      <div class="min-title">Jugenddienst</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Jugendliche erleben Gemeinschaft, Lobpreis und Gottes Wort — jeden Donnerstag.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🏠</div>
      <div class="min-title">Hauskreis</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Leitung und Koordination der wöchentlichen Hauskreisgruppen in der Region.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="min-card reveal">
      <div class="min-icon">🌐</div>
      <div class="min-title">Übersetzung</div>
      <div class="min-desc">Simultanübersetzung und mehrsprachige Kommunikation für unsere internationale Gemeinde.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MEDIEN -->
<section id="midias" style="background: var(--deep2);">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-label">Online folgen</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Medien &amp;<br>Livestream</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Verpasse keinen Gottesdienst. Verfolge uns online, schaue frühere Predigten und bleibe verbunden.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- YouTube Carousels -->
  <div class="yt-carousel-section reveal" id="ytCarousels"></div>

  <!-- Subscribe Button -->
  <div style="margin-top:40px; margin-bottom:8px; text-align:center;">
    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@ChristusGemeindeStuttgart?sub_confirmation=1"
       target="_blank" rel="noopener"
       onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(201,168,76,0.08)';this.style.transform='translateY(-2px)'"
       onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent';this.style.transform='none'"
       style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;background:transparent;border:2px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);padding:18px 48px;border-radius:50px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.25s;letter-spacing:0.03em;">
      <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="flex-shrink:0">
        <path d="M23.5 6.19a3.02 3.02 0 0 0-2.12-2.14C19.54 3.5 12 3.5 12 3.5s-7.54 0-9.38.55A3.02 3.02 0 0 0 .5 6.19 31.6 31.6 0 0 0 0 12a31.6 31.6 0 0 0 .5 5.81 3.02 3.02 0 0 0 2.12 2.14C4.46 20.5 12 20.5 12 20.5s7.54 0 9.38-.55a3.02 3.02 0 0 0 2.12-2.14A31.6 31.6 0 0 0 24 12a31.6 31.6 0 0 0-.5-5.81z" fill="#C9A84C"/>
        <polygon points="9.75,15.02 15.5,12 9.75,8.98 9.75,15.02" fill="#0D1117"/>
      </svg>
      YouTube Kanal abonnieren
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="midias-grid">
    <div class="midias-social reveal">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:4px;">Folge uns</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:8px;">Bleib immer auf dem Laufenden über Neuigkeiten, Events und Inspirationen.</p>
      <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@ChristusGemeindeStuttgart" target="_blank" class="social-link">
        <div class="social-icon social-yt">▶</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:0.88rem;">YouTube</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted);">Predigten &amp; Shorts</div>
        </div>
        <span style="margin-left:auto; color:var(--text-dim);">→</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/cgstuttgart/" target="_blank" class="social-link">
        <div class="social-icon social-ig">📷</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:0.88rem;">Instagram</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted);">Stories &amp; Fotos</div>
        </div>
        <span style="margin-left:auto; color:var(--text-dim);">→</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/icz.stuttgart.79" target="_blank" class="social-link">
        <div class="social-icon social-fb">f</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:0.88rem;">Facebook</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted);">Community &amp; Events</div>
        </div>
        <span style="margin-left:auto; color:var(--text-dim);">→</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://wa.me/4917664187445" target="_blank" class="social-link">
        <div class="social-icon social-wa">💬</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:0.88rem;">WhatsApp</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted);">Direktkontakt</div>
        </div>
        <span style="margin-left:auto; color:var(--text-dim);">→</span>
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="midias-app reveal">
      <div class="app-title">CGS App<br>für dein Smartphone</div>
      <div class="app-desc">Gottesdienste, Gebete, Tageslosung, Veranstaltungen und mehr — immer in der Hosentasche.</div>
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; margin-top:8px;">
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
          <div style="background:#fff; border-radius:12px; padding:10px; width:100%; aspect-ratio:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
            <img src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&data=https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cgs.stuttgart.app" alt="Google Play QR Code" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain; border-radius:4px;">
          </div>
          <a href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cgs.stuttgart.app" target="_blank" class="app-badge" style="width:100%; justify-content:center; font-size:0.85rem;">
            ▶ Google Play
          </a>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
          <div style="background:#fff; border-radius:12px; padding:10px; width:100%; aspect-ratio:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
            <img src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&data=https://apps.apple.com/app/id6762139108" alt="App Store QR Code" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain; border-radius:4px;">
          </div>
          <a href="https://apps.apple.com/app/id6762139108" target="_blank" class="app-badge" style="width:100%; justify-content:center; font-size:0.85rem;">
            🍎 App Store
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- KONTAKT -->
<section id="contato">
  <div class="contato-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label reveal">Komm vorbei</div>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal">Finde uns &amp;<br>schreib uns</h2>
      <p class="section-desc reveal">Wir freuen uns auf dich — ob beim Gottesdienst, per E-Mail oder einfach so zum Kaffee.</p>

      <div class="contato-info">
        <div class="contato-item reveal">
          <div class="contato-icon">📍</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contato-label">Adresse</div>
            <div class="contato-value">Karl-Benz-Straße 3<br>70794 Filderstadt</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contato-item reveal">
          <div class="contato-icon">✉</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contato-label">E-Mail</div>
            <div class="contato-value">info@cgsstuttgart.de</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contato-item reveal">
          <div class="contato-icon">📅</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contato-label">Gottesdienst</div>
            <div class="contato-value">Sonntags · 10:30 Uhr<br>Mit Kinderprogramm &amp; Kaffee</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; margin-top:40px;" class="reveal">
        <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/place/Karl-Benz-Stra%C3%9Fe+3,+70794+Filderstadt/@48.6757276,9.1973436,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x4799c2806571d721:0x77a52dbc5866adff!8m2!3d48.6757276!4d9.1999239!16s%2Fg%2F11b8vfl37v?authuser=0&entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDQyNi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D"
           target="_blank" rel="noopener"
           style="display:block; border-radius:var(--radius); overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12); height:240px; transition:opacity 0.2s;"
           onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.85'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
          <iframe
            src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d2632.29!2d9.2167!3d48.6767!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x4799c2806571d721:0x77a52dbc5866adff!2sKarl-Benz-Stra%C3%9Fe+3%2C+70794+Filderstadt!5e0!3m2!1sde!2sde!4v1"
            style="width:100%; height:100%; border:none; display:block; pointer-events:none;"
            allowfullscreen loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
          </iframe>
        </a>
        <div style="border-radius:var(--radius); overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12); height:240px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64,"
               alt="Stuttgart Flughafen – Wir treffen uns in der Nähe"
               style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block;">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="contato-form reveal">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:8px;">Schreib uns</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:28px;">Wir melden uns so schnell wie möglich bei dir.</p>

      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Vorname</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Max">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Nachname</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Mustermann">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">E-Mail</label>
        <input type="email" class="form-input" placeholder="deine@email.de">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Nachricht</label>
        <textarea class="form-input" placeholder="Wie können wir dir helfen?"></textarea>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%; justify-content:center; padding:16px;" onclick="submitForm(this)">
        Nachricht senden ✉
      </button>
      <p id="formFeedback" style="text-align:center; margin-top:12px; color:var(--gold); font-size:0.85rem; display:none;">Danke! Wir melden uns bald. 🙏</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-top">
    <div class="footer-brand">
      <div class="footer-logo">
        <img src="https://i.ibb.co/Xfp20yt5/Ativo-1-Copia-removebg-preview.png" alt="CGS Logo">
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--white);">
          Christus Gemeinde<br>
          <span style="font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:400; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase;">Stuttgart</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="footer-desc">Eine lebendige, internationale Gemeinde in der Region Stuttgart — offen für alle, die Gott suchen.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Navigation</h4>
      <ul class="footer-links">
        <li><a href="#sobre">Über uns</a></li>
        <li><a href="#programacao">Programm</a></li>
        <li><a href="#grupos">Hauskreise</a></li>
        <li><a href="#ministerios">Ministerien</a></li>
        <li><a href="#midias">Medien</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contato">Kontakt</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Gottesdienste</h4>
      <ul class="footer-links">
        <li><a href="#programacao">Montag · Gebet · 19:00</a></li>
        <li><a href="#programacao">Donnerstag · FLY · 19:30</a></li>
        <li><a href="#programacao">Sonntag · GD · 10:30</a></li>
        <li><a href="mailto:info@cgsstuttgart.de">info@cgsstuttgart.de</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <div class="footer-copy">© 2026 Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart e.V. · Karl-Benz-Str. 3, 70794 Filderstadt</div>
    <div class="footer-love">Gemacht mit <span>♥</span> für die Gemeinde</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- EVENT MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="eventModal" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal-wrapper">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-content" id="modalContent">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const events = [
  {
    id: '6', title: 'Gebet', date: '2026-03-16', time: '19:00', weekday: 'Montags',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Jeden Montag laden wir euch herzlich ein, gemeinsam mit uns zu beten. Ob für persönliche Anliegen, unsere Gemeinde oder die Welt – zusammen im Gebet sind wir stark. Kommt einfach vorbei, alle sind willkommen!',
    image: 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/18BPT_9-4xFeK3wdnx8oPRPCnyu7-Nm_w', weekly: true
  },
  {
    id: '1', title: 'Jugendgottesdienst FLY', date: '2026-03-20', time: '19:30', weekday: 'Donnerstags',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Gemeinschaft, Lobpreis und ein Wort, das dein Leben verändert. Sei dabei!',
    image: 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1nx_yvpp8nyouqKfzCnr9ChKNGSqa-6f-', weekly: true
  },
  {
    id: '4', title: 'Sonntagsgottesdienst', date: '2026-03-22', time: '10:30', weekday: 'Sonntags',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Feiere mit uns den Sonntag! Mit Kinderprogramm und anschließendem Kaffee.',
    image: 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1ADG_xVKSNTOT2JBnFqsGD68IAIsYcHqC', weekly: true
  },
  {
    id: '5', title: 'Männer-Treff', date: '2026-04-25', time: '10:00',
    location: 'Gerlingen',
    description: 'Ein besonderer Tag nur für Männer! Komm und erlebe einen unvergesslichen Tag voller Gemeinschaft, Lobpreis und Gottes Wort.\n\n🎵 Lobpreis & Anbetung\n📖 Gottes Wort\n🤝 Echte Gemeinschaft\n🥩 Costela Fogo de Chão – brasilianisches Grillen!\n\nAnmeldung erforderlich. Komm und bring einen Freund mit!',
    image: 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1mAwH1f0tqvrDlva9KJBzvo-7F74AbDvW', weekly: false, rsvp: 'https://forms.gle/example'
  },
  {
    id: '7', title: 'Teensnacht', date: '2026-05-23', time: '18:00',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Eine unvergessliche Nacht für Teens! Gemeinschaft, Spiele, Gottes Wort und jede Menge Spaß. Anmeldung erforderlich.',
    image: 'https://i.ibb.co/4RGM7rRY/Gemini-Generated-Image-aevui2aevui2aevu.png', weekly: false
  },
  {
    id: '8', title: 'Mitgliedsversammlung', date: '2026-06-28', time: '13:00',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Gemeinsame Mitgliedsversammlung der Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart. Alle Mitglieder sind herzlich eingeladen.',
    image: 'https://i.ibb.co/3yGXH3Gc/Gemini-Generated-Image-buku44buku44buku.png', weekly: false
  },
  {
    id: '9', title: 'Taufe / Batismo', date: '2026-07-05', time: '10:30',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Feiere mit uns den wichtigen Schritt der Taufe! Ein besonderer Gottesdienst, bei dem Menschen öffentlich ihren Glauben bekennen.',
    image: 'https://i.ibb.co/RGxwM94b/Gemini-Generated-Image-hx5lo0hx5lo0hx5l.png', weekly: false
  },
  {
    id: '11', title: 'Renew Soccer', date: '2026-05-09', time: '',
    location: 'Karl-Benz-Straße 3, Filderstadt',
    description: 'Eine Gruppe junger Brasilianer, die diese Tage in unserer Gemeinde verbringen wird, um durch Fußball und brasilianische Kultur zu missionieren.',
    image: 'https://i.ibb.co/jP0KnX4W/Gemini-Generated-Image-ap1jtjap1jtjap1j.png', weekly: false
  }
];

function formatDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  const d = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
  return d.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', { weekday: 'long', day: '2-digit', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
}

function renderEvents() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('eventsGrid');
  grid.innerHTML = events.map(e => `
    <div class="event-card reveal" onclick="openModal('${e.id}')">
      <img class="event-image" src="${e.image}" alt="${e.title}" onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/400x225/1c2128/gold?text=CGS'">
      <div class="event-body">
        <div class="event-badge ${e.weekly ? 'event-weekly' : ''}">
          ${e.weekly ? '🔄 Wöchentlich' : '📌 Besonderes Event'}
        </div>
        <div class="event-title">${e.title}</div>
        <div class="event-meta">
          <div class="event-meta-row"><span class="event-meta-icon">📅</span> ${e.weekly && e.weekday ? e.weekday : formatDate(e.date)}${e.time ? ' · ' + e.time + ' Uhr' : ''}</div>
          <div class="event-meta-row"><span class="event-meta-icon">📍</span> ${e.location}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="event-desc">${e.description}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
  observeReveal();
}

function openModal(id) {
  const e = events.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!e) return;
  const content = document.getElementById('modalContent');
  content.innerHTML = `
    <img class="modal-image" src="${e.image}" alt="${e.title}" onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/600x338/1c2128/gold?text=CGS'">
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div style="font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;">${e.weekly ? '🔄 Wöchentlich' : '📌 Besonderes Event'}</div>
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);line-height:1.2;">${e.title}</h2>
      <div class="modal-meta">
        ${e.date ? `<div class="modal-meta-chip">📅 ${e.weekly && e.weekday ? e.weekday : formatDate(e.date)}</div>` : ''}
        ${e.time ? `<div class="modal-meta-chip">⏰ ${e.time} Uhr</div>` : ''}
        <div class="modal-meta-chip">📍 ${e.location}</div>
      </div>
      <p class="modal-desc">${e.description}</p>
      <div class="modal-actions">
        ${e.rsvp ? `<a href="${e.rsvp}" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">Anmelden →</a>` : ''}
        <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Karl-Benz-Stra%C3%9Fe+3,+70794+Filderstadt" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost">Karte öffnen 🗺</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('eventModal').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}

function closeModal(e) {
  if (e && e.target !== document.getElementById('eventModal')) return;
  document.getElementById('eventModal').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}

// Close on Esc
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal(); });

// Hamburger
document.getElementById('hamburger').onclick = () => document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.add('open');
document.getElementById('mobileClose').onclick = () => document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open');
function closeMobile() { document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open'); }

// Scroll reveal
function observeReveal() {
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(el => { if (el.isIntersecting) { el.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(el.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
}

// Navbar transparency
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const nav = document.getElementById('navbar');
  nav.style.borderBottomColor = window.scrollY > 80 ? 'rgba(201,168,76,0.18)' : 'rgba(201,168,76,0.12)';
});

// Form
function submitForm(btn) {
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.textContent = 'Wird gesendet...';
  setTimeout(() => {
    btn.textContent = '✓ Gesendet!';
    document.getElementById('formFeedback').style.display = 'block';
  }, 1200);
}

// Init
renderEvents();
observeReveal();

// ── YouTube Carousel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
(function() {
  const CHANNEL_ID = 'UC_ZjoR41cxa1yCw2xvG-DnQ';
  const YT_API_KEY  = 'AIzaSyDUkCuGK6bdsPry-I2HLekRk-6AkYiEplg';

  const CAROUSELS = [
    { type: 'shorts',  title: 'Shorts',                    url: 'https://www.youtube.com/@ChristusGemeindeStuttgart/shorts'  },
    { type: 'live',    title: 'Letzte Predigten (Live)',   url: 'https://www.youtube.com/@ChristusGemeindeStuttgart/streams' },
    { type: 'videos',  title: 'Video-Archiv',              url: 'https://www.youtube.com/@ChristusGemeindeStuttgart/videos'  },
  ];

  // Hardcoded fallback IDs per category
  const FALLBACK = {
    shorts: [
      { id: 'DkXjjXp8mN4', title: 'CGS Short' },
      { id: 'abcShort2',   title: 'CGS Short' },
      { id: 'abcShort3',   title: 'CGS Short' },
    ],
    live: [
      { id: 'omJ4bBwhpm0', title: 'Gottesdienst – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: '6BvhLdrb2sg', title: 'Gottesdienst – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: 'd7c6AtzWbLc', title: 'Gottesdienst – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: 'ZfLNBut6ntc', title: 'Gottesdienst – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: 'AcEp2ZZD0nY', title: 'Gottesdienst – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
    ],
    videos: [
      { id: '52kyFkknMHk', title: 'Predigt – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: 'aTaFSnqpLJw', title: 'Predigt – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: 'EnuXfWPNmfs', title: 'Predigt – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: 'gwp-yITM6I8', title: 'Predigt – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
      { id: '7nFpon4Amus', title: 'Predigt – Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart' },
    ],
  };

  const container = document.getElementById('ytCarousels');
  if (!container) return;

  // Render skeleton placeholders immediately
  container.innerHTML = CAROUSELS.map(c => `
    <div class="yt-carousel-block" id="ytBlock-${c.type}">
      <div class="yt-carousel-header">
        <div class="yt-carousel-title">${c.title}</div>
        <a class="yt-carousel-link" href="${c.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">→ YouTube</a>
      </div>
      <div class="yt-carousel-row" id="ytRow-${c.type}">
        ${[1,2,3,4].map(() => `<div class="yt-skeleton" style="width:${c.type==='shorts'?'90px':'150px'};aspect-ratio:${c.type==='shorts'?'9/16':'16/9'};flex-shrink:0;border-radius:10px"></div>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');

  function parseDuration(dur) {
    const m = dur.match(/PT(?:(\d+)H)?(?:(\d+)M)?(?:(\d+)S)?/);
    if (!m) return 0;
    return parseInt(m[1]||0)*3600 + parseInt(m[2]||0)*60 + parseInt(m[3]||0);
  }

  function esc(s) { return String(s).replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }

  function renderRow(type, videos) {
    if (!videos || !videos.length) return;
    const row = document.getElementById('ytRow-' + type);
    if (!row) return;
    const isShort = type === 'shorts';
    const W = isShort ? '90px' : '150px';
    const aspect = isShort ? 'aspect-ratio:9/16' : 'aspect-ratio:16/9';
    const ytUrl = CAROUSELS.find(c=>c.type===type).url;

    const header = document.getElementById('ytBlock-' + type).querySelector('.yt-carousel-link');
    header.textContent = videos.length + ' →';

    let html = videos.map(v => `
      <div class="yt-thumb" style="width:${W};${aspect}" onclick="ytPlay(this,'${v.id}',${isShort})">
        <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/${v.id}/mqdefault.jpg" alt="${esc(v.title)}" loading="lazy">
        <div class="yt-thumb-play">
          <div class="yt-thumb-play-btn">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 10 12"><polygon points="0,0 10,6 0,12"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="yt-thumb-title">${esc(v.title)}</div>
      </div>
    `).join('');

    html += `<a class="yt-thumb-more" href="${ytUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="width:${W};${aspect}">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--gold)" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="15" rx="2"/><path d="M16 2l-4 5-4-5"/><polygon points="10,11 16,14.5 10,18" fill="var(--gold)" stroke="none"/></svg>
      <span>YouTube</span>
    </a>`;

    row.innerHTML = html;
  }

  // Player state
  let activeType = null, activeId = null;

  window.ytPlay = function(el, id, isShort) {
    const block = el.closest('.yt-carousel-block');
    const type  = block.id.replace('ytBlock-', '');
    const row   = document.getElementById('ytRow-' + type);

    block.querySelectorAll('.yt-thumb.active').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));

    if (activeType === type && activeId === id) {
      block.querySelectorAll('.yt-player-wrap, .yt-player-close').forEach(n => n.remove());
      activeType = activeId = null;
      return;
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('.yt-player-wrap, .yt-player-close').forEach(n => n.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('.yt-thumb.active').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));

    el.classList.add('active');
    activeType = type; activeId = id;

    const playerDiv = document.createElement('div');
    playerDiv.className = 'yt-player-wrap';
    playerDiv.style.cssText = isShort
      ? 'max-width:220px;margin:0 auto;aspect-ratio:9/16'
      : 'aspect-ratio:16/9';

    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
    iframe.src = `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${id}?autoplay=1`;
    iframe.allow = 'accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture';
    iframe.allowFullscreen = true;
    iframe.style.cssText = 'width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:block;';
    playerDiv.appendChild(iframe);

    const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.className = 'yt-player-close';
    closeBtn.textContent = '✕ Schließen';
    closeBtn.onclick = () => {
      playerDiv.remove(); closeBtn.remove();
      el.classList.remove('active');
      activeType = activeId = null;
    };

    row.before(closeBtn);
    row.before(playerDiv);
    playerDiv.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
  };

  // ── Fetch via YouTube Data API v3 ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Uses dedicated search per category so each carousel only shows its own content

  async function fetchPlaylistItems(playlistId, maxResults = 50) {
    let allItems = [];
    let pageToken = '';
    do {
      const url = `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/playlistItems?part=snippet&playlistId=${playlistId}&maxResults=50&key=${YT_API_KEY}${pageToken ? '&pageToken=' + pageToken : ''}`;
      const res = await fetch(url, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.error) throw new Error(data.error.message);
      allItems = allItems.concat(data.items || []);
      pageToken = data.nextPageToken || '';
    } while (pageToken && allItems.length < maxResults);
    return allItems;
  }

  async function fetchVideoDetails(ids) {
    // Batch in groups of 50 — include liveStreamingDetails to detect live broadcasts
    const results = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < ids.length; i += 50) {
      const batch = ids.slice(i, i + 50);
      const res = await fetch(
        `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/videos?part=snippet,contentDetails,liveStreamingDetails&id=${batch.join(',')}&key=${YT_API_KEY}`,
        { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) }
      );
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.error) throw new Error(data.error.message);
      results.push(...(data.items || []));
    }
    return results;
  }

  async function tryAPI() {
    // 1. Fetch Shorts via dedicated search (videoDuration=short filters ≤4 min)
    //    YouTube marks Shorts via the #Shorts tag or duration ≤60s with vertical aspect
    //    Best public API approach: search with type=video&videoDuration=short, then filter ≤60s
    const shortsRes = await fetch(
      `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/search?part=snippet&channelId=${CHANNEL_ID}&type=video&videoDuration=short&order=date&maxResults=50&key=${YT_API_KEY}`,
      { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) }
    );
    const shortsData = await shortsRes.json();
    if (shortsData.error) throw new Error(shortsData.error.message);
    const shortIds = (shortsData.items || []).map(i => i.id?.videoId).filter(Boolean);

    // 2. Fetch Live/completed broadcasts via search
    const liveRes = await fetch(
      `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/search?part=snippet&channelId=${CHANNEL_ID}&type=video&eventType=completed&order=date&maxResults=50&key=${YT_API_KEY}`,
      { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) }
    );
    const liveData = await liveRes.json();
    if (liveData.error) throw new Error(liveData.error.message);
    const liveIds = (liveData.items || []).map(i => i.id?.videoId).filter(Boolean);

    // 3. Fetch regular uploads playlist for Video-Archiv
    const chRes = await fetch(
      `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/channels?part=contentDetails&id=${CHANNEL_ID}&key=${YT_API_KEY}`,
      { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) }
    );
    const chData = await chRes.json();
    if (chData.error) throw new Error(chData.error.message);
    const uploadsId = chData.items?.[0]?.contentDetails?.relatedPlaylists?.uploads;
    if (!uploadsId) throw new Error('No uploads playlist');

    const playlistItems = await fetchPlaylistItems(uploadsId, 100);
    const allUploadIds = playlistItems.map(i => i.snippet?.resourceId?.videoId).filter(Boolean);

    // 4. Get full details for all videos to check duration & liveStreamingDetails
    const allIds = [...new Set([...shortIds, ...liveIds, ...allUploadIds])];
    const details = await fetchVideoDetails(allIds);

    // Build lookup map
    const detailMap = {};
    for (const item of details) detailMap[item.id] = item;

    // 5. Classify — priority: Shorts → Live → Videos
    const shortsSet = new Set(shortIds);
    const liveSet   = new Set(liveIds);

    const shorts = [], live = [], videos = [];

    for (const item of details) {
      const secs  = parseDuration(item.contentDetails?.duration || '');
      const pub   = item.snippet?.publishedAt || '';
      const date  = pub ? new Date(pub).toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}) : '';
      const v     = { id: item.id, title: item.snippet?.title || '', published: date };
      const hasLiveDetails = !!item.liveStreamingDetails;

      if (shortsSet.has(item.id) && secs > 0 && secs <= 60) {
        // True Short: appeared in shorts search AND ≤60 seconds
        shorts.push(v);
      } else if (hasLiveDetails || liveSet.has(item.id)) {
        // Live broadcast (completed stream)
        live.push(v);
      } else if (!shortsSet.has(item.id)) {
        // Regular upload (exclude items that are shorts but >60s edge cases)
        videos.push(v);
      }
    }

    // Sort each by most recent first (details come in mixed order)
    const byDate = arr => arr.sort((a,b) => {
      const pa = a.published.split('.').reverse().join('');
      const pb = b.published.split('.').reverse().join('');
      return pb.localeCompare(pa);
    });

    return { shorts: byDate(shorts), live: byDate(live), videos: byDate(videos) };
  }

  // ── RSS fallback via proxy (no API key needed) ────────────────────────────
  async function tryRSS() {
    const rssUrl = `https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=${CHANNEL_ID}`;
    const proxies = [
      `https://corsproxy.io/?url=${encodeURIComponent(rssUrl)}`,
      `https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(rssUrl)}`,
      `https://api.codetabs.com/v1/proxy?quest=${encodeURIComponent(rssUrl)}`,
    ];
    for (const proxy of proxies) {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(proxy, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(6000) });
        if (!res.ok) continue;
        const xml = await res.text();
        const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(xml, 'text/xml');
        const all = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('entry')).map(e => {
          const href = e.querySelector('link')?.getAttribute('href') || '';
          const id   = href.match(/v=([^&]+)/)?.[1] || '';
          const title = e.querySelector('title')?.textContent || '';
          return { id, title };
        }).filter(v => v.id);
        if (all.length) return all;
      } catch { /* try next */ }
    }
    return null;
  }

  async function fetchVideos() {
    try {
      const { shorts, live, videos } = await tryAPI();
      renderRow('shorts', shorts.length ? shorts : FALLBACK.shorts);
      renderRow('live',   live.length   ? live   : FALLBACK.live);
      renderRow('videos', videos.length ? videos : FALLBACK.videos);
      return;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('YouTube API failed:', e);
    }

    // RSS fallback — no duration/live info, classify by title only
    try {
      const all = await tryRSS();
      if (all) {
        const rssLive   = all.filter(v =>
          /Christus Gemeinde Stuttgart\s*\//i.test(v.title) ||
          /gottesdienst/i.test(v.title) ||
          /livestream/i.test(v.title) ||
          /live\s*culto/i.test(v.title) ||
          /culto\s*ao\s*vivo/i.test(v.title)
        );
        const rssVideos = all.filter(v => !rssLive.includes(v));
        renderRow('shorts', FALLBACK.shorts);
        renderRow('live',   rssLive.length   ? rssLive   : FALLBACK.live);
        renderRow('videos', rssVideos.length ? rssVideos : FALLBACK.videos);
        return;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('RSS fallback failed:', e);
    }

    // Last resort: hardcoded fallback
    CAROUSELS.forEach(c => renderRow(c.type, FALLBACK[c.type]));
  }

  fetchVideos();
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
